Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u ytmonitor -pytmonitor mybooks -e "DESCRIBE videos; SELECT * FROM videos LIMIT 5\\G")

Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u ytmonitor -pytmonitor mybooks -e "SELECT youtube_id, title, thumbnail, published_at, duration, views FROM videos WHERE content_type = 'full length read-aloud' ORDER BY published_at DESC;")
Bash(mysql -u ytmonitor -pytmonitor mybooks -e "SELECT id, title, illustrator, lccn FROM books ORDER BY title;")
Bash(mysql -u ytmonitor -pytmonitor mybooks -e "SELECT b.title, bf.format, bf.published_on FROM books b JOIN book_formats bf ON b.id = bf.book_id ORDER BY b.title;")
Bash(mysql -u ytmonitor -pytmonitor mybooks -e "SELECT id, book_id, format, isbn, amazon_url FROM book_formats WHERE amazon_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY book_id, format;")
